tweets.text:
For decades, globalists moved our jobs overseas, destroyed our industrial dominance, and crushed the American Dream.

Now, President Trump is restoring America’s Economic and Industrial Greatness. 

We’re already seeing the beginnings of this in our job market, as more jobs are created to build the facilities that will house the high-paid manufacturing and tech jobs of tomorrow. 

Thanks to President Trump’s America First policies, these new jobs are going to go to AMERICAN-BORN Workers — and will unleash a golden age of opportunity for our People.

The Future is Ours 🇺🇸

The American People are worth Fighting For.

Under President Trump’s leadership, hardworking Americans are finally being put First after four long years of Joe Biden’s economic disaster.

✅Ensured ALL net job growth has gone to American-Born Workers

✅ Worked to bring down inflation and increase real wages for Americans

✅ Secured historic investments in American Industry

✅Laid the groundwork to build a stronger and more skilled American Workforce

We are just getting started. 2026 is going to be HISTORIC 🔥

tweets.text:
One year ago today, the President of the American Worker was inaugurated for a historic second term. 

By returning President Trump to the White House, the People sent a message loud and clear: they were tired of the globalist status quo that destroyed the American Dream and left hardworking Americans behind. 

In just one year, President Trump has crushed that status quo — and the Department of Labor is doing everything we can to put our Workers and our Nation FIRST.

The winning has only just begun. 

AMERICA FIRST. AMERICANS FIRST.

tweets.text:
For decades, globalists crushed the American Dream, allowed millions of migrants to flood our Nation and take American Jobs, and upended our way of life.

But now, under President Trump, we’re undoing this damage. 

From making housing affordable for hardworking Americans to ensuring all net job growth goes to American-Born workers, President Trump is doing more to protect the American Way of Life than any President in history. 

A lot of progress left to make, but we’re never giving up the fight to restore our Nation’s Greatness.

A reminder where the job market was this time last year: 

Under the Biden Administration from August 2023-2024, foreign-born workers GAINED 1,240,000 jobs while American-Born workers LOST 1,319,000.

In just one year under President Trump, this trend has been completely reversed. 

Under his leadership, over 2.5 MILLION American-Born workers gained jobs while 670,000 foreign-born workers lost jobs. 

And we are just getting started. 

A lot more winning to come 🔥
